title: cDNA Synthesis Protocol
steps: Prepare samples by adding 4 ug of rna to rnase free water for a total of 20ul volume.

Prepare Master Mix 1 with 2 ul per sample of Oligo-dt primer (Thermofisher #18418012) and 2 ul per sample of dNTP mix (Thermofisher #18427088). Prepare at least 10 % excess volume to ensure sufficient quantity.
Add 4 ul of Master Mix 1 to each sample.
Incubate samples at 65 degrees Celcius for 10 minutes.
Place samples on ice for 5 minutes and then quickly centrifuge.

Prepare Master Mix 2 with 2 ul per sample of SuperScript III (Thermofisher #18080085), 2 ul per sample of Rnase Out (Thermofisher # 10777019), 8 ul per sample of 5 X first strand buffer (component of Thermofisher #18080085), and 4 ul per sample of DTT (component of Thermofisher #18080085). Prepare at least 10 % excess volume in order to ensure sufficient quantity.
Pipet 16 ul of Master Mix 2 per sample.
Incubate samples at 42 degress Celcius for 2 hours.
Incubate samples at 65 degrees for 5 minutes.
Add 160 ul of Rnase free water to samples.
creator: James P O'Callaghan
